name: Collapsible Dog Crate
key_features: Side Panel Screws for Added Structural Support
description: Rock Creek Crates' collapsible dog crate is built for pet lovers who want a rugged yet portable home for their pup. It includes a 10-year warranty, multiple locking points, and ventilation designed to keep dogs comfortable. (293 reviews)

name: ClearView UV Protection Window Tint Kit
description: ClearView's window tint kit offers 35% VLT UV-blocking film for a clean, professional finish. Pre-cut for most sedan models.
